g.text: MySQL DB System Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- compartmentId drift in the current code path
- Managed and name-resolved reconciles currently do not
enter the update path, so mutable updates are
- The formal secret-delete profile is stronger than current
code because Secret cleanup is still best-effort.
- Look for an existing delete work request before submitting
- Wait for the matching DB system delete work request to
succeed, or treat GetDbSystem not-found as complete.
- Attempt Secret cleanup only after OCI delete confirmation.
OCI state in CREATING, UPDATING, INACTIVE, TRANSIENT_READ_ERROR
OCI state in FAILED, DELETING, DELETED
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
wait for the matching delete work request
owned Secret cleanup fails after OCI delete
retry Secret cleanup until completion is allowed
